identity.name: E1_Grocery_Tracker
identity.description: A hyper-functional, high-contrast utility app that borrows the freshness of a farmer's market. Avoiding the sterile 'finance app' look in favor of bold typography, crisp data visualization, and organic color accents.

typography.rules: Use Manrope for Headings and Data (Prices) as it supports Greek and has excellent tabular figures. Use IBM Plex Sans for Body text for high legibility.

colors.usage: Use 'background' (slate-50) for the app base to avoid clinical white. Use 'surface' (white) for cards. Use 'primary' (Emerald) for positive actions (Add Receipt, Save). Use 'secondary' (Orange) for price alerts and comparison highlights.

buttons.primary: bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-lg shadow-primary-600/20 hover:bg-primary-700 active:scale-95 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 active:scale-95

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm rounded-2xl p-5
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm rounded-2xl p-5 active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform

inputs.base: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/20 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-base outline-none transition-all

icons.instructions: Use Lucide icons for all UI elements. For Supermarket Logos, use the 'StoreIcon' component which renders a colored circle with the store initial if no SVG is available.

micro_interactions.entrance: opacity-0 translate-y-4 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-slate-500 is only used on white backgrounds. Use text-slate-600 for better readability on grey backgrounds.

universal_guidelines: Avoid 'SaaS Blue'. Use Emerald Green and Vibrant Orange to evoke freshness and urgency.
No gradients on text. Keep text sharp and high-contrast.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Do not use generic 'Inter' font. Use 'Manrope' for headings/data and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body to support Greek characters.
Ensure bilingual support is considered in layout (Greek words can be longer).
